messages.content: Hi there! Welcome to Puppychef 🐾 We're Delhi's favorite spot for custom dog cakes, treats, and yummy bites for your furry friends. What can we whip up for your pup today? 🎂🐶

Please take a look at our menu and let us know what interests you 😊

🐕 *🎂 Custom Cakes*

a) Dog Birthday Cake
   Special birthday cake with pet-safe ingredients
   💰 ₹800-₹2500

b) Pupcakes (Pack of 6)
   Cupcakes sized for dogs
   💰 ₹450

c) Mini Cakes
   Individual portion cakes
   💰 ₹350

Reply with a letter (a, b, c...) to select!
Or type "BACK" to return to main menu.

Wonderful choice! 🎂 To customize your cake:

1️⃣ Pet's name
2️⃣ Flavor (Chicken/Mutton/Peanut Butter)
3️⃣ Size (Small/Medium/Large)
4️⃣ Message on cake (optional)

Perfect! 🐶 Shivangi is going to love it!

How many Dog Birthday Cakes would you like?

tempItem.name: Dog Birthday Cake
tempItem.description: Special birthday cake with pet-safe ingredients
